teams.title: Agent Teams
teams.note: Agent Teams collapsed into implicit session presence in 2.1.178 (no more TeamCreate/TeamDelete). This page only browses agent config (.md files); team runtime orchestration (tmux teammate panes) is a session runtime concern, not configuration.
